name: Chicken with Pine Nuts
recipeInstructions:
MINUTES (Skillet 10; Oven 20)
The brown sauce should be ready.
Coat the chicken breasts with flour thoroughly.
In a large skillet, heat oil on medium high until hot. Add the chicken breasts and sauté for 3 to 4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown. Remove the chicken breasts and place them in a large baking dish. Cover the dish and keep the chicken warm.
Drain the oil from the skillet. Add butter and heat on medium high until melted. Add pine nuts and sauté for 1 to 2 minutes, or until golden brown.
Add garlic and white wine, and cook for 3 to 4 minutes, or until the wine has evaporated.
Add lemon juice, parsley, heated Brown Sauce, salt, and pepper. Stir ingredients together.
Pour sauce over chicken.
Preheat oven to 350°F. Bake chicken for 15 minutes, or until very hot.
BROWN SAUCE:
In a medium saucepan, heat butter on medium until melted. Add flour and stir for 1 minute. Slowly add heated broth while stirring constantly. Continue stirring until the sauce reaches boiling point. Add salt and pepper. It is ready as sauce.
